'''woshachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:keeplike|keeplike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-sh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:keeplike|keeplike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| woshachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:woshachithi|woshachithi]] || [[word:woshachiji|woshachiji]] || [[word:woshachishi|woshachishi]] || [[word:woshachiki|woshachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:woshachuthuthu|woshachuthuthu]] || [[word:woshachujuju|woshachujuju]] || [[word:woshachushushu|woshachushushu]] || [[word:woshachukuku|woshachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:woshachuthu|woshachuthu]] || [[word:woshachuju|woshachuju]] || [[word:woshachushu|woshachushu]] || [[word:woshachuku|woshachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:woshachufthuf|woshachufthuf]] || [[word:woshachufjuf|woshachufjuf]] || [[word:woshachufshuf|woshachufshuf]] || [[word:woshachufkuf|woshachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:woshachethe|woshachethe]] || [[word:woshacheje|woshacheje]] || [[word:woshacheshe|woshacheshe]] || [[word:woshacheke|woshacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:woshachothotho|woshachothotho]] || [[word:woshachojojo|woshachojojo]] || [[word:woshachoshosho|woshachoshosho]] || [[word:woshachokoko|woshachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:woshachotho|woshachotho]] || [[word:woshachojo|woshachojo]] || [[word:woshachosho|woshachosho]] || [[word:woshachoko|woshachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:woshachofthof|woshachofthof]] || [[word:woshachofjof|woshachofjof]] || [[word:woshachofshof|woshachofshof]] || [[word:woshachofkof|woshachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:woshachĂŻfthĂŻf|woshachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:woshachĂŻfjĂŻf|woshachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:woshachĂŻfshĂŻf|woshachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:woshachĂŻfkĂŻf|woshachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:woshachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|woshachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:woshachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|woshachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:woshachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|woshachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:woshachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|woshachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:woshachĂŻfthĂŻf|woshachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:woshachĂŻfjĂŻf|woshachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:woshachĂŻfshĂŻf|woshachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:woshachĂŻfkĂŻf|woshachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:woshachĂŻfthĂŻf|woshachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:woshachĂŻfjĂŻf|woshachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:woshachĂŻfshĂŻf|woshachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:woshachĂŻfkĂŻf|woshachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:woshachĂŠthĂŠ|woshachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:woshachĂŠjĂŠ|woshachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:woshachĂŠshĂŠ|woshachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:woshachĂŠkĂŠ|woshachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:woshachathatha|woshachathatha]] || [[word:woshachajaja|woshachajaja]] || [[word:woshachashasha|woshachashasha]] || [[word:woshachakaka|woshachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:woshachatha|woshachatha]] || [[word:woshachaja|woshachaja]] || [[word:woshachasha|woshachasha]] || [[word:woshachaka|woshachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:woshachafthaf|woshachafthaf]] || [[word:woshachafjaf|woshachafjaf]] || [[word:woshachafshaf|woshachafshaf]] || [[word:woshachafkaf|woshachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:woshachasha|woshachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:woshachshĂ«asha|woshachshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:woshachroasha|woshachroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:woshachmuasha|woshachmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:woshachyaasha|woshachyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowoshachnkshĂ«asha|gowoshachnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowoshachnkroasha|gowoshachnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowoshachnkmuasha|gowoshachnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowoshachnkyaasha|gowoshachnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:woshashachasha|woshashachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:woshashachshĂ«asha|woshashachshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:woshashachroasha|woshashachroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:woshashachmuasha|woshashachmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:woshashachyaasha|woshashachyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowoshashachnkshĂ«asha|gowoshashachnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowoshashachnkroasha|gowoshashachnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowoshashachnkmuasha|gowoshashachnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowoshashachnkyaasha|gowoshashachnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:weshĂŠchasha|weshĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:weshĂŠchshĂ«asha|weshĂŠchshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:weshĂŠchroasha|weshĂŠchroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:weshĂŠchmuasha|weshĂŠchmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:weshĂŠchyaasha|weshĂŠchyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goweshĂŠchnkshĂ«asha|goweshĂŠchnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goweshĂŠchnkroasha|goweshĂŠchnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goweshĂŠchnkmuasha|goweshĂŠchnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goweshĂŠchnkyaasha|goweshĂŠchnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:woshfachasha|woshfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:woshfachshĂ«asha|woshfachshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:woshfachroasha|woshfachroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:woshfachmuasha|woshfachmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:woshfachyaasha|woshfachyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowoshfachnkshĂ«asha|gowoshfachnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowoshfachnkroasha|gowoshfachnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowoshfachnkmuasha|gowoshfachnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowoshfachnkyaasha|gowoshfachnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
